breakdown: This PR adds CR (CodeRabbit) fallback logic to Skeptic Gates workflows, allowing approval via status checks combined with [approve] comments when no formal review exists. Key improvements: proper error handling with exit code capture, robust pipeline mode with set +e/-e and pipefail, and supporting both coderabbitai[bot] and coderabbitai user logins. Variable naming is clear (LATEST_CR_PIPELINE, *_EXIT codes). No test files added but workflow changes are verified via the CI itself.
key_changes: Add fallback to CR status+comment approval when no formal review exists
Add proper error handling with set +e/-o pipefail and exit code checking
Support both coderabbitai[bot] and coderabbitai user login formats
Extract CR review lookup into LATEST_CR_PIPELINE with exit code tracking
Filter status check by context 'CodeRabbit' without requiring 'success' state only
